alkylation reagent: 400 mM 2-chloroacetamide (Sigma) was added at 1:10 ratio to the samples.
alkylation concentration: 400 mM 2-chloroacetamide (Sigma) was added at 1:10 ratio to the samples.
cleavage agent: Samples were digested with MS-grade trypsin (Worthington Biochemical) at 1:20 wt:wt in 50 mM TEAB for 15 h at 37 °C.
collision energy: MS2 was acquired at resolution of 60,000, AGC target of 2e5 with max fill time set at 200 ms, stepped HCD of 28, 33, and 55, isolation width set at 0.7 m/z.
enrichment method: S-trap digested samples were resuspended in 1 ml of 1× Immunoaffinity Purification (IAP) bind buffer...
instrument: analyzed on Orbitrap Exploris 480 mass spectrometer with FAIMS...
labeling: TMTpro labeling was carried out on-bead by adding 10 μl of reconstituted TMTpro reagent...
